name: Screwball Squirrel
summary:
在鸟语花香、风景如画的大森林里，小松鼠们开心的采集果实。灰色的小松鼠珊米天真无邪，可爱漂亮，她偶遇一只通体红色且长相夸张的松鼠。两只松鼠一番交谈后，红松鼠将珊米制服。因为他讨厌珊米所代表的那种真善美的可爱小故事，他希望主宰这部动画，让动画片充满追逐打斗。他的邪恶计划初步得逞，随后便打电话给附近的老狗肉头。肉头本身脾气非常好，但是红松鼠想方设法激怒对方。
　　于是乎一部原本充满和谐温暖的小动画，就这样被红松鼠变成了战争动画……

name: Bugs Bunny Nips the Nips
summary: Bugs lands on a Japanese-held island. He tries to outsmart one Japanese soldier by dressing as Emperor Hirohito, but the soldier isn't fooled. He recognizes Bugs from his Warner Brothers films produced by Leon Schlesinger. Bugs has trouble with a tough sumo wrestler but is able to outwit him by dressing as a geisha. Bugs finally rids the island of Japanese by driving up in his ice cream truck (which plays music from The Magic Flute!) and selling each one an ice cream with a secret grenade surprise.
